payload.answer: SELECT is allowed; DELETE is denied in admin SQL select-only mode.
citations: Input: Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied.
payload.decision: No durable memory should be committed; the fixture indicates SELECT is allowed and DELETE is denied, but this is an access-control test rather than user memory

entity_resolution.reason: No persistent entity in the fixture requires durable linking; this is a transient permission evaluation

payload.intent: Evaluate debug SQL permissions in select-only mode and avoid committing durable memory

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode permits SELECT queries such as SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10.
Admin SQL select-only mode denies DELETE operations on memory_cards.

repair_options: If this is intended to be a memory update, avoid storing it because it is environment-specific and not user-stable.
If a policy record is needed, store only the abstract rule: select-only mode allows read queries and denies destructive writes.
